findings.title: Whitespace-only HMAC secret bypasses required-secret check in startServer
findings.detail: In src/server.ts line 55-56, !secret is truthy for a whitespace-only string. An operator who accidentally sets IFLEET_HMAC_SECRET to spaces would pass the guard. Fixed by trimming before the guard.

findings.title: Unsafe JSON.parse cast in readCostLog allows NaN cost totals in summarizeCosts
findings.detail: src/utils/costs.ts line 49 cast JSON.parse result without validating numeric fields. Fixed by adding isValidCostRecord guard and flatMap to skip malformed lines.
findings.fix_sketch: Added isValidCostRecord type guard, flatMap skips malformed lines

findings.title: Silent swallow of postChannelMessage error loses observability on Discord side-effects
findings.detail: src/queue/sources/discord.ts line 150 caught postChannelMessage failures silently. Fixed by adding console.warn log.
